crypto_intro_1: Indawo ye-cryptocurrency ikhule ngokushesha nezinkulungwane zamathokheni ahlukene namaphrojekthi.
crypto_intro_2: Nakuba i-Bitcoin yayingeyokuqala futhi isahlala iyaziwa kakhulu, ihlukile kakhulu kuno enye imboni ye-crypto.
crypto_intro_3: Ake sihlole umehluko oyinhloko phakathi kwe-Bitcoin nezinhlelo ze-cryptocurrency ezibanzi.
point_1_summary_1: Inqubo ye-Bitcoin ihlele ngokuyisisekelo kusukela ngo-2009, inikeza imithetho elindelekile engeke yashintshwa kalula. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto avame ukubuyekeza izinqubo zawo, ashintshe i-tokenomics, noma a-fork zibe yizinguqulo ezintsha, okudala ukungaqiniseki kubasebenzisi.
point_2_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenza kunethiwekhi engacentralized ngempela enezinkulungwane zamashumi ama-node azimele emhlabeni wonke. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto alawulwa ngama-foundation, izinkampani, noma amaqoqo amancane ababhali abangathatha izinqumo ngokuswela ukusondelana ngekusasa lenqubo.
point_3_summary_1: I-Bitcoin inomkhawulo oqinile wezinhlamvu ezingu-21 million ezizokhona, okuyenza ibe yinto yedijithali enqabile kunazo zonke. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto anamanani angenamkhawulo, izindlela zenfleshini, noma angakha amathokheni amasha ngokukhululeka, okunciphisa inani labanikazi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.
point_4_summary_1: I-Bitcoin inenjongo eyodwa elula: imali yedijithali yontanga-ku-ntanga. Noma ubani angayiqonda futhi ayisebenzise ngolwazi oluyisisekelo. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto afaka izinkontileka ezihlakaniphile eziyinkimbinkimbi, izinqubo ze-DeFi, noma izindlela zokulawula ezidinga ulwazi lwezobuchwepheshe ukuze usebenzise ngokuphepha.
point_5_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenzisa ukuvumelana kwe-Proof of Work, okuhlolwe emphini iminyaka engaphezu kwengu-15 ngaphandle kohlaselo oluphumelele olulodwa kunethiwekhi eyinhloko. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto asebenzisa izindlela zokuvumelana ezihlolwayo efana ne-Proof of Stake noma izinhlelo ezabeliwe ezingakaqinisekisi ukuphepha kwazo kwesikhathi eside.
point_6_summary_1: I-Bitcoin isebenza njengomali yedijithali - indawo yokugcina inani kanye nensizakalo yokushintshanisa. Amathokheni amaningi e-crypto angamathokheni okusebenzisa amapulatifomu athile, amathokheni okulawula, noma impahla yokuhlola eneziphakamiso zenani lomhlaba wangempela ezingacacile.
point_7_summary_1: I-Bitcoin iba namandla ngaphansi kokuhlasela futhi isindile kuyo yonke inkinga, ukuvalwa, nokusolwa okuthunyelwe kuyo. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto abuthakathaka futhi angawa ngenxa yengcindezi yezomthetho, izinkinga zobuchwepheshe, noma ukwehla kwezimakethe.
point_8_summary_1: I-Bitcoin ayinayo i-CEO, ayinankampani emva kwayo, futhi ayinandawo eyodwa yokuhluleka. Amaphrojekthi amaningi e-crypto aesekwa yizinkampani ze-venture capital, anobuholi obuhlonzekayo, noma ancike ezinkampanini ezithile ukuze aqhubeke nokusebenza.
